description: The Symbols section links `OutputSymbol` to `api/types/OutputSymbolOptions.md` instead of `api/types/OutputSymbol.md`, so the primary symbol type reference sends readers to the options page rather than the symbol API.

The `OutputSymbol` API page still contains unresolved placeholder links in the `copyToSpace` and external-library remarks, which makes the documented copy/external-symbol workflow incomplete even though the rest of the page is usable.

The Symbols section links `OutputSymbol` to `api/types/OutputSymbolOptions.md` instead of `api/types/OutputSymbol.md`, so the primary symbol type reference sends readers to the options page rather than the symbol API.

The `OutputSymbol` API page still contains unresolved placeholder links in the `copyToSpace` and external-library remarks, which makes the documented copy/external-symbol workflow incomplete even though the rest of the page is usable.
